song.title: Open My Eyes, Lord
song.author: Bob Cull
song.lyrics: [V1] .D Em7 Em Open my eyes, Lord. .A7 G D I want to see Jesus, .Bm Em7 Em To reach out and touch Him, .A7 G D And say that I love Him.|| .D Em7 Em Open my ears, Lord, .A7 G D And help me to listen. .Bm Em7 Em Open my eyes, Lord. .A7 G D I want to see Jesus.|| . Open our eyes…
